description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for [2.5 sec->1.5 sec]. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, [attack range increases by 50%->attacks in a wider range], and Down duration increases by [3.5 sec->(added) 0.5 sec].

Dashes behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [25%->24%] for [10 sec->5 sec]. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied [500->600] higher.

Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [3 sec->1 sec], then enters [God's Proxy] state for [20 sec->10 sec], enhancing skills. [God's Proxy]: ATK increases by [???->314*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))], ATK Spd increases by [(removed) 250], All Dodge Chance increases by [(removed) 250], and Normal Attack DMG increases by [125%->100%]. Gains immunity to CC. This effect cannot be dispelled.

[ATK increases by 192*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Magic Evasion increases by 240->Increases own All DEF and All Dodge Chance by 200]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [30%->20%], and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by [30%->20%].

dark.unified: On hit, increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by [P.DEF by 30% for 10 sec->24% for 5 sec].

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by [All Dodge Chance by 250->140] for the duration.

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [100%->34%] for the duration.
On evasion, restores [5%->6%] of Max HP every 3 sec.

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [10->5] times and is irremovable.
[Valiant Dash] Stuns the target for 1.5 sec, and reduces Cooldown by [{0}%->10%] upon a Critical Hit.
[God's Proxy] increases Dodge Chance by an additional [250->400] and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases [Magic Evasion by 360->DEF Boost by 50%] and increases DMG dealt to [heroes->bosses] by {0}%.

dark.unified: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to [80%->60%] of ATK. Applied at [160%->120%] against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.

description.unified: On hit, has a 35% chance to deal additional Physical DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. This effect can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.

Summons the soul of the Holy Sword, Aea for 10 sec, increasing own ATK by [30%->40%] and [All DEF by 30%->P.DEF by 50%]. The soul follows Kasel, recovering HP of nearby allies equal to 5% of their Max HP for 1 sec [(removed) dispeling all negative effects] and dealing Physical DMG to nearby enemies for 1 sec.

1.from: Changes ATK and DEF Boost to 50% and increases the duration by 5 sec.

2.from: Increases DMG dealt to nearby enemies by 100% and dispels positive effects from hit enemies.
2.to: Increases DMG dealt to nearby enemies by 100%.
2.unified: Increases DMG dealt to nearby enemies by 100%.
